title: Architect WebSocket Scaling via Pub/Sub
description: Implement a distributed backplane using Redis or NATS for WebSocket message synchronization. Architect scalable WebSocket solutions for clustered server fleets using Pub/Sub patterns.
objectives: Implement a distributed backplane using Redis or NATS for WebSocket message synchronization.
Architect scalable WebSocket solutions for clustered server fleets using Pub/Sub patterns.
